SEARCH

nib 1.6.28-SNAPSHOT API

Packages
Package
Description
com.nib.commons
Common utilities and core runtime components for the NIB application framework.
com.nib.commons.annotations
Provides common annotations for the NIB framework.
com.nib.commons.cobol
Provides the interfaces for generic COBOL runtimes
com.nib.commons.esql
API classes for Embedded SQL (E/SQL) integration and runtime support.
com.nib.commons.exceptions
Contains exception classes used throughout the NIB Commons library.
com.nib.commons.io
Provides core Input/Output (I/O) components and abstractions for handling various file organizations and access methods.
com.nib.commons.io.cache
Provides caching mechanisms for I/O operations.
com.nib.commons.io.catalog
Provides catalog management mechanisms for I/O operations.
com.nib.commons.io.exceptions
Provides exception classes for I/O operations.
com.nib.commons.io.tools
Provides command-line tools and utilities for file system operations.
com.nib.commons.io.vsam
Provides classes and interfaces for emulating VSAM (Virtual Storage Access Method) file organizations.
com.nib.commons.licensing
Provides classes and interfaces for managing software licensing.
com.nib.commons.log
Sysout APIs Implementations.
com.nib.commons.redis
Shared resources API for REDIS
com.nib.commons.shres
Provides classes and interfaces for managing shared resources across application nodes.
com.nib.commons.storage
Provides components for managing memory storage and simulating mainframe-like data types.
com.nib.commons.utils
General purpose utility classes for common operations.
com.nib.grammars
 
com.nib.groovybatch
Batch API for Groovy.
com.nib.motorhead
Core implementation and configuration for the Supernaut distributed job execution engine.
com.nib.motorhead.client
Client-side command-line interface (CLI) commands for interacting with the Motorhead cluster.
com.nib.motorhead.diagnostics
Diagnostic tools and snapshot models for monitoring the state of the Supernaut cluster.
com.nib.motorhead.exceptions
Exceptions for the Supernaut runtime engine.
com.nib.motorhead.mongodb
MongoDB implementation for Supernaut 's long-term storage.
com.nib.motorhead.rdbms
Relational Database (RDBMS) implementation for Supernaut 's long-term storage.
com.nib.motorhead.redis
Redis-based implementation for Supernaut 's cluster backbone.
com.nib.motorhead.redis.config
 
com.nib.motorhead.rest
REST API controllers and data transfer objects (DTOs) for the Supernaut service.
com.nib.motorhead.scripting
Scripting engine and integration interface for job scripts.
com.nib.scripting
NIB scripting framework.
com.nib.scripting.utils
NIB Batch utilities
com.nib.scripting.utils.dbutils
DB API
com.nib.scripting.utils.dbutils.commands
 
com.nib.scripting.utils.ftp
FTP client
com.nib.scripting.utils.iebgener
IEBGENER

com.nib.scripting.utils.nibtool

com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.api
Public API interfaces exposing Supernaut services over Spring Cloud Functions.
com.nib.supernaut.ati
Automatic Transaction Initiation (ATI) support for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.backbone
Core infrastructure and distributed coordination interface for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.backbone.embedded
Embedded single-node implementation of Supernaut backbone.
com.nib.supernaut.bms
Basic Mapping Support (BMS) base objects.
com.nib.supernaut.cobol
COBOL interface and runtime support for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.commands
CICS-like commands API classes.
com.nib.supernaut.ctg
Supernaut CTG API
com.nib.supernaut.exceptions
Exceptions for Supernaut online errors.
com.nib.supernaut.extensions
Extension points and plugin mechanisms for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.files
File control and access management for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.jms
Java Message Service (JMS) integration for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.jms.api
Supernaut JMS API
com.nib.supernaut.observability
Observability and monitoring interface for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.queues
Transient Data (TD) and Temporary Storage (TS) queue management for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.resources
Resource definition and management for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.resources.sys
Supernaut system resource definitions
com.nib.supernaut.security
Security and authentication services for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.spool
Spooling interface for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.systran
System transactions for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.tcp
TCP/IP socket communication support for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.terminal
General terminal control and emulation handling for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.terminal.jsonterminal
JSON terminal services
com.nib.supernaut.terminal.printer
virtual printer terminal services
com.nib.supernaut.terminal.tn3270
TN3270 terminal services
com.nib.supernaut.values
Value objects and constants for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.web
CICS-like Web interface and HTTP services.
com.nib.utilities
This package contains utility classes and helper methods for the migrated applications.
com.nib.utilities.api.le
Language Environment (LE) API utilities.
